div1.entryFree:
Confirmation, 1) firmer establishment, strengthening: to thee it shall descend with better quiet, better opinion, better c. H4B IV, 5, 189.
2) asseveration, assurance: a second time receive the c. of my promised gift, All's II, 3, 56. let heaven witness, how dear I hold this c. H8 V, 3, 174.
3) additional evidence: the particular --s, to the full arming of the verity, All's IV, 3, 71. for a greater c. I have dispatched . . ., Wint. II, 1, 180. for c. that I am much more, Lr. III, 1, 44. trifles are to the jealous --s, Oth. III, 3, 323. Cymb. I, 6, 174. Per. V, 3, 54.
